value_table_status: WORKS (raw 21,000,000 -> 21.0 m_usd; Fable ra_0002 table verified live)

bugs.root_cause: Context.dimension_u_ids / member_u_ids use a 10-digit ZERO-PADDED cik prefix (e.g. 0000023217:...), but Dimension.u_id / Member.u_id use the UNPADDED cik (23217:...). u_id lookup missed for every dimensional fact -> all explicit dims dropped -> length mismatch -> fail-closed.
bugs.fix: normalize the cik segment (strip leading zeros) before the u_id lookup. VERIFIED: normalized u_id matches Dimension count=1 and Member count=1.

bugs.root_cause: XBRL periods are stored EXCLUSIVE: end_date (and instant start_date) = inclusive_end + 1 = periodOfReport + 1. VERIFIED on AAL 10-K (periodOfReport=2024-12-31): current-year duration end_date=2025-01-01 (n=729); current-year instant=2025-01-01 (n=763). Strict literal 'end_date == periodOfReport' therefore matches NOTHING -> 0 primary for ALL facts (durations too, not just instants).
bugs.correct_reading: period end = INCLUSIVE end = end_date - 1 = periodOfReport for a primary fact. P4b: (end_date - 1) == periodOfReport (still strict equality, just the correct field). build_known joins on (end_date - 1) == periodOfReport. Classifier matches inclusive windows.
bugs.interaction_with_prior_ruling: SUPERSEDES the 'instant off-by-one = observation, change nothing, strict P4b remains' ruling: the DRI instant +1 was NOT a 52/53-week anomaly, it is THIS universal exclusive-end convention. Under the inclusive reading the DRI instant is a NORMAL primary; instant_off_pOR_by_one becomes ~0 / retired.
bugs.recommendation: adopt inclusive-end (end_date - 1) reading for P4b + build_known + classifier, after a quick corpus-wide confirmation the +1 convention is universal (verified AAL + DRI so far). Strict equality preserved.
